# Paramus Dental Arts

> Paramus Dental Arts is a family and cosmetic dentistry practice in Paramus, New Jersey, led by Dr. Olga Degtyareva and Dr. Margarita Degtyareva. The practice offers general, cosmetic, and implant dentistry, including veneers, teeth whitening, dental implants, Invisalign-style clear aligners, and more.

Location: 27 Madison Ave Ste 110, Paramus, NJ 07652
Phone: (201) 845-5533
Website: https://www.paramusdentalarts.com

## Services
- [Services Overview](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/services/): Summary of all dental services offered.
- [General Dentistry](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/services/general-dentistry/)
- [Cosmetic Dentistry](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/cosmetic-dentistry/)
- [Porcelain Veneers](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/cosmetic-dentistry/porcelain-veneers/)
- [Professional Teeth Whitening](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/cosmetic-dentistry/professional-teeth-whitening/)
- [Dental Crowns & Bridges](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/cosmetic-dentistry/dental-crowns-bridges/)
- [Botox Treatment](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/cosmetic-dentistry/botox-treatment/)
- [Dental Implants](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/dental-implants/)
- [Full Mouth Dental Implants](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/dental-implants/full-mouth-dental-implants/)
- [Affordable Dental Implants](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/services/affordable-dental-implants/)
- [Implant Maintenance](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/implant-maintenance/)
- [LAPIP Failing Implant Treatment](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/lapip-failing-implant-treatment/)
- [Periodontics](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/services/periodontics/)
- [Oral Surgery](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/services/oral-surgery/)
- [Full Mouth Reconstruction](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/services/full-mouth-reconstruction/)
- [TMJ Treatment](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/services/tmj-treatment/)
- [Sleep Apnea Treatment](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/services/sleep-apnea-treatment/)
- [Sedation Dentistry](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/services/sedation-dentistry/)
- [Emergency Dentistry](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/services/emergency-dentistry/)
- [Laser Dentistry](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/laser-dentistry/)
- [Candid Ortho Clear Aligners](https://www.paramusdentalarts.com/candid-ortho-clear-aligner/)
